case_title: SAXE REAL ESTATE MANAGEMENT SERVICES, INC. vs. GUSTAVSON, JEFF et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF J. MARGULIES REGARDING BREACH OF STIP FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAXE REAL ESTATE MANAGEMENT SERVICES, INC.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAXE REAL ESTATE MANAGEMENT SERVICES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT GUSTAVSON, JEFF DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GUSTAVSON, JEFF THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1348 SACRAMENTO ST, #17, SF, CA $3,750.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,750.00, LEASE FORFEITED, NO STAYS SHALL BE SOUGHT OR PERMITTED. SEE JUDGMENT PURS TO STIPULATION FOR COMPLETE DETAILS.
